metadata.description: Curated marketplace for Fernando Furtado's Claude Code plugins — flat & pragmatic dev workflow tooling.

plugins.name: pragmatic-dev-toolkit
plugins.description: Workflow skills for alignment, execution and diagnosis; YAGNI/QA/security/doc/design reviewers; stack-aware test scaffolder (Python today); self-gated hooks; configurable path contract via CLAUDE.md. For flat & pragmatic projects.
